It is quick and easy to install, the connection is compatible with 32/38 mm flexible hose or 50 mm PVC pipe. The pump offers a flow rate of 4 m³ per hour and has a pre-filter to catch coarser impurities. The transparent pre-filter lid allows to check the filter contamination. The powder-coated motor resists water and chemicals, while the reinforced plastic housing components resist chlorine. The components of the case are made of reinforced chlorine resistant plastic. The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 4 filter pump is self-priming. It is installed a maximum of 2 m above the water level and 3 m below the water level. items.raw_desc: LTE antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G:        Directional antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G with cross-polarization is the optimal solution for 4G/5G reception and backward compatible with LTE/2G/3G in areas with weak signal. Two integrated 2 MIMO antennas with opposite polarization support diversity of reception and thus ensure a quality signal. Compared to the previous generation, this antenna has a redesigned inner part for even higher efficiency. In addition to the new bands, the gain at 1700 MHz and 2.7 GHz is approximately 3 dB higher than the previous generation. Antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G  is supplied with double low-loss cable HDF-195 of 5 m length terminated with 2× SMA-m connector. The SMA connector used is commonly used in a wide range of routers. To maximize signal quality and minimize potential transients, the antenna does not use connectors and the cable is connected directly.
